description_long: This chair features a minimalist, industrial design with a thin, metal frame and a circular seat. The backrest is composed of two slender, upward-curving rods that meet at the top, forming a gentle arch with a geometric accent. The seat is flat and round, likely made of metal with a textured, matte finish, and is supported by four long, narrow legs that curve outward at the base for stability. A circular support ring connects the legs beneath the seat, adding structural integrity and a decorative element. The entire chair is finished in a uniform, rust-brown color, giving it a weathered, outdoor-ready appearance. Its open, airy construction and lack of armrests make it suitable for casual seating in urban parks, patios, or sidewalk cafes.
description: A minimalist metal chair with a round seat, arched backrest, and four slender, outward-curving legs, finished in a rust-brown color. Its open frame and circular support ring give it an industrial, outdoor-ready look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular seat, arched backrest, and symmetrical leg arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile, curved backrest, and outward-flaring legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the arch of the backrest and the circular support ring beneath the seat.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the geometric accent at the top of the backrest and the seat's flatness.
